channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Controversial Democrat who called for imprisoning 'Zionists' loses primary after backlash
item.description: Texas Democrat accused of antisemitic remarks about jailing Zionists was defeated by rival Johnny Garcia in the TX-35 primary runoff.

item.title: Democratic Socialist Chris Rabb poised to become the most radical member of Congress
Trump-backed Air Force veteran wins GOP runoff in redrawn House district
item.description: Republican Carlos de la Cruz, endorsed by Trump, defeated incumbent John Lujan in a runoff for a newly redrawn Texas congressional district.

item.title: Another Hollywood liberal targets Spencer Pratt, but he fires back with a sharp retort
